name: Chicken Dijon (Diabetic)
recipeIngredient: 8 oz (1/2 cup) of carton plain yogurt, unsweetened low-fat
8 chicken breast halves (3 oz each), skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the yogurt and mustard in a bowl, stirring until well blended.
2. Brush the breast halves evenly with the yogurt mixture.
3. Coat the chicken pieces with the breadcrumb mixture.
4. Arrange the chicken in a 12 x 8 x 2 inch baking dish coated with cooking spray.
5. Cover the dish and bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
6. Increase the temperature to 450°F and bake, uncovered, for an additional 15 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the coating is browned.
Yield: 8 servings; Each serving contains one breast half
Exchange: 2 Lean Meat; 1 Vegetable
Cholesterol: 40 mg; Calories: 129; Carbohydrates: 6 gm; Protein: 18 gm; Fat: 3 gm; Fiber: Tr.; Sodium: 353 mg
